new_text: Fee Distribution System: /home/crab/projects/chainovi/agave/runtime/src/bank/fee_distribution.rs (883 lines). Implements 4-way fee split via distribute_transaction_fee_details(). Launch: 10/0/45/45 (burn/validator/treasury/dev). Maturity: 25/25/25/25. Linearly interpolates over 1825 epochs. Validator share to collector_id, treasury to trv1_treasury_pubkey, developer to developer_rewards_program_id. Rounding remainders go to burn. Bank fields: trv1_treasury_pubkey, trv1_fee_state, trv1_fee_config inherited across slots. Config in eclipse_tfork_constants.rs (279 lines). Fee market integration via trv1_fee_integration.rs (56 lines) with BlockFeeState, FeeMarketConfig, update_base_fee_from_parent().

Project Dawn: Agave fork at github.com/project-dawn-chain/agave (branch projectdawn-hardening, cloned to /home/crab/agave). Replaces Solana inflation with: 5% flat staking APY, 4-way EIP-1559 fee split (burn/validator/treasury/developer), 5-tier passive staking with lockups, permanent stake locking (120% bonus), developer rewards from fee attribution, on-chain treasury. Key files: stake_flags.rs, instruction.rs, error.rs, projectdawn_config.rs, bank.rs, fee_distribution.rs, calculation.rs, inflation_rewards/mod.rs, stake_state.rs, stake_instruction.rs, genesis/src/main.rs. Latest: 137cf3d "fix: correct fee split schedule to 10/0/45/45 launch, 25/25/25/25 maturity".

OptimisticChain LOW/INFORMATIONAL fixes (2026-02-10): 5 LOW: (L-1) require(governor != address(0)) in StakingManager, PassiveStaking, RewardMinter. (L-2) Added events for setMinValidatorStake, setCurrentEpoch, setPermanentUnlockThresholdBps, setAPYs on RewardMinter. (L-3) Added getValidatorList() to StakingManager. (L-4) Treasury spending enforced by governance. (L-5) Bounds validation: APY ≤ 10000 bps, minValidatorStake > 0, epochLength ≥ 10, votingPeriod ≥ 100. 4 INFO: (I-1) Replaced magic numbers with named constants. (I-2) Gas optimizations for PassiveStaking (O(1) counters already fixed). (I-3) Consistent error message prefixes. (I-4) Added totalPositionCount(), tierStaked() getters. 241 tests passing (215 existing + 26 new).

OptimisticChain genesis config (2026-02-10): (1) generate-genesis.sh: Uses `forge inspect <Contract> deployedBytecode` for runtime bytecode. (2) genesis.json: OP Stack compatible (chainId 42069, bedrock/regolith/canyon/ecotone/fjord), customConfig (stakingAPYBps=500, epochLength=600, feeTransitionEpochs=1825), 7 allocs (StakingManager, PassiveStaking, FeeDistributor, ChainGovernor, Treasury, RewardMinter, Dev). (3) initialize-predeploys.sh: Constructors don't run at genesis; storage must initialize separately. KEY: deployedBytecode = runtime bytecode (needed for genesis). LIMITATION: Predeploy storage slots zeroed at genesis—need genesis storage entries or initializer pattern for production.

(1) ComputeGenesisStorage.s.sol: Added DeveloperRewards import/deployment, fixed Treasury section (was stale), logs slot 4 (_authority), added _emitStorageEntry for Treasury _authority, updated header to 7 predeploys. Treasury storage: slot 4 = _authority (GOVERNOR = 0xf39Fd6e51...), DeveloperRewards: no constructor, all zero at genesis. Predeploys.sol already has DEVELOPER_REWARDS = 0x...0106. devnet/genesis.json must be regenerated by running script. forge build: 55 files, no errors. go build ./... (op-geth): OK.

Chainovi/eclipse-agave #7 Phase 5A: fee_distribution.rs → Developer Rewards. Changes: (1) Imports: solana_developer_rewards_program types, AccountSharedData. (2) Added credit_developer_fees_direct(): derives config PDA, reads/writes ProgramRevenueConfig, deposits lamports to fee pool PDA, updates EpochFeeTracker. (3) Rewrote distribute_developer_fees(): tries credit_developer_fees_direct() first, falls back to treasury. (4) Added is_emergency_unlocked() (Phase 5C check). (5) 3 unit tests: missing PDA→false, inactive→false, epoch rollover. runtime/Cargo.toml: added solana-developer-rewards-program + solana-governance-program. 14 tests pass (was 11).

Chainovi #7: OptimisticChain Design (2026-03-07) Treasury + DeveloperRewards Option B. TREASURY: totalDeposited/Withdrawn/lastDepositBlock, 2-step authority, emergency pause, deposit source tracking (FeeDistributor/DeveloperRewards/Direct), per-category spend limits. DEVELOPERREWARDS: gas-weighted distribution, registration (7-day cooldown), revenue splits (max 10 recipients ≤10000 bps), anti-gaming (1000 gas min, 10% cap), batch claiming, governance blacklist, DEPOSITOR_ACCOUNT system caller, deactivate/activate, predeploy 0x...0106. KEY: DeveloperRewards replaces FeeDistributor dApp tracking. FeeDistributor sends dApp share as lump sum to DeveloperRewards. Pure EVM/Solidity, OP Stack, solc 0.8.25.

Session 229: Built Torus-Pi Adapter Extension at ~/Desktop/torus-pi-adapter/pi-extension/. Bridges Torus gate enforcement to Pi's tool system via subprocess calls to enforcer.py/tracker.py. FILES: (1) types.ts: EnforcerInput, SubprocessResult, ToolCallEvent, GateDecision interfaces. (2) config.ts: env vars (TORUS_HOOKS_DIR, TORUS_STATE_DIR, PI_SESSION_ID, timeouts, PYTHON_BIN). (3) tool-name-map.ts: Pi↔Torus bidirectional mapping (edit↔Edit, bash↔Bash), isGatedTool/isTrackedTool. (4) enforcer-bridge.ts: spawns enforcer.py, JSON stdin, interprets exit codes (0=allow, 2=block). (5) tracker-bridge.ts: fire-and-forget tracker.py spawn. (6) boot-bridge.ts: runs boot.py on load. (7) index.ts: main extension (onLoad boot, onToolCall gate, onToolResult track). (8) gates/tool_aliases.py: PI_TO_TORUS_TOOL_MAP dict. Design: zero runtime deps, fail-open, gates in Python, strict TypeScript, ES2020 target, CommonJS output, 0 errors.

Created /home/crab/.claude/hooks/shared/tool_patterns.py: Markov chain tool call pattern analysis. PUBLIC API: load_sequences(queue_path)→List[List[str]], build_markov_chain(sequences)→MarkovChain, predict_next_tool(recent_tools, queue_path, top_k)→List[Tuple[str,float]] (Laplace-smoothed), get_workflow_templates(queue_path, min_count, max_templates)→List[WorkflowTemplate], detect_unusual_sequence(recent_tools, queue_path, sigma_threshold)→Optional[AnomalyReport], get_transition_matrix(queue_path), get_tool_stats(queue_path), summarize_patterns(queue_path). DESIGN: Lazy loading, mtime cache invalidation, Laplace smoothing (alpha=0.1), session boundary (id change OR 5-min gap), skips UserPrompt+PreCompact, anomaly detection (sigma≥2.0 below mean OR ≥2 rare transitions), 107 tests pass against live queue (/home/crab/.claude/hooks/.capture_queue.jsonl).
